div1.entryFree: Candle-waster, one who wastes candles by sitting up all night, probably not a reveller, as some have supposed, but a nocturnal student; a bookworm: patch grief with proverbs, make misfortune drunk with --s, Ado V, 1, 18; i. e. drown grief with the wise saws of pedants and book-worms.
